metric_definitions.net_modeled_pnl: Final modeled weekly corridor equity in model points after friction.
metric_definitions.max_gross_deployment_dollars: Peak active layer entry cost sum converted to dollars.
metric_definitions.worst_day_pnl_dollars: Minimum grouped daily bar_pnl converted to dollars.
metric_definitions.worst_week_pnl_dollars: Minimum grouped week bar_pnl converted to dollars.
metric_definitions.profit_factor_by_closed_layer: Gross winner realized_pnl divided by absolute gross loser realized_pnl.
metric_definitions.profit_factor_by_week: Gross positive weekly modeled pnl divided by absolute gross negative weekly modeled pnl.
metric_definitions.weekly_occupancy_rate: Share of bars where price stayed inside the active butterfly corridor span.
metric_definitions.weeks_traded: Distinct week_key count with DEPLOY_INITIAL actions.
metric_definitions.weeks_aborted: Distinct week_key count with ABORT actions.
metric_definitions.max_active_butterflies: Maximum concurrent active weekly butterflies observed in the equity curve.
